# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: vpc_project_default
    type: 'cloud_v1.project'
    properties: {}
  
  - name: "{yourProjectName}-network"
    type: 'compute_v1.network'
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true # Enable Auto-create Subnets mode for simplicity of deployment without manual IP planning, default is false (manual)
  
  - name: "{yourProjectName}-subnet"
    type: 'compute_v1.subnetwork'
    properties: {} |+
